Orison is the little stamp that you can put on a card to buff it e.g. +1 arithmetica when played, inflict 1 vulnerable, etc

After a battle, you normally get an option to engrave orison onto your cards. With Gluttony you can choose to not do that and instead get a max hp up

After every battle, you get to add an effect onto one of your cards (an orison). You can choose to ignore the effects and instead increase your max hp, but you can only do it thrice per investigation.
